task:
OBJECTIVE: Create /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/lib/custodian.ts

The Custodian Agent. Owns audio data lifecycle — uploads to S3 for Transcribe, deletes immediately after.

Use EXACTLY:
import { S3Client, PutObjectCommand, DeleteObjectCommand } from "@aws-sdk/client-s3";
const s3 = new S3Client({ region: process.env.KOMMIT_AWS_REGION!, credentials: { accessKeyId: process.env.KOMMIT_AWS_KEY!, secretAccessKey: process.env.KOMMIT_AWS_SECRET! } });

Export these two functions:

1. uploadAudio(buffer: Buffer, filename: string): Promise<string>
   Uploads buffer to S3 bucket process.env.KOMMIT_S3_BUCKET! with key filename.
   Returns the S3 key on success.
   On error throws with message "Audio upload failed: <error message>"

2. deleteAudio(key: string): Promise<void>
   Deletes the object from S3 bucket process.env.KOMMIT_S3_BUCKET!.
   Silently swallows errors — deletion failure must never block the user.
   Logs deletion errors to console.error only.

FILE header comment explaining the privacy principle: audio is transient, deleted immediately after transcription.
JSDoc on both functions.

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/lib/custodian.ts

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
uploadAudio and deleteAudio exported
Uses process.env.KOMMIT_S3_BUCKET!
deleteAudio never throws
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: hardcode bucket name or region
DO NOT: use ast.parse
